Cycling Gloves.description: Based on our Trail Finale Glove, but with a super-lightweight mesh back of hand material. These gloves are the pinnacle of lightweight performance and versatility for off-road riding.
key_features: Super lightweight construction – Even lighter than the Trail Finale gloves. Protection without the bulk.
Breathability – Developed with trail and enduro pros for maximum breathability. Shred the trails without distraction.
Grip – Lightweight AX Suede palm offers exceptional grip in all conditions.
Bar feel – Cushion-free palm delivers exceptional control and a connected feel
images: Cycling Gloves/Trail Lightweight Glove - FrontSide - Rapha (only one image of this glove).avif

Cycling Gloves.description: A hard-wearing essential, designed to maintain hand comfort during extended periods on the bars with strategic padding and integrated reflectivity.
key_features: Strategic Palm Padding – Purposefully placed high-density padding dampens road vibrations and reduces pressure on key nerves, keeping your hands comfortable on the hoods or drops for longer
Articulated Comfort – Features reflective heat-transfer dots across the back of the hand that allow for natural stretch and movement, ensuring a non-restrictive fit during gear changes and braking
Adjustable Security – A refined Velcro fastening at the wrist provides a customisable fit and allows for easy removal, even when hands are damp or tired after a long stint
Enhanced Visibility – The reflective dot pattern on the back of the hand increases your visibility to other road users, particularly when signalling in low-light conditions
Ax-Suede Brow Wipe – A dedicated Ax-suede panel on the thumb provides a soft, absorbent surface for wiping perspiration away during high-intensity efforts
images: Cycling Gloves/Brevet Mitts - FrontSide (inverted)- Rapha.avif
Cycling Gloves/Brevet Mitts - FrontSide - Rapha .avif

Cycling Gloves.description: Lightweight and durable gloves to withstand the demands of trail riding. Developed with professional Trail & Enduro riders, so you can be confident in their performance when it matters most.
key_features: Lightweight & Durable – Using a lightweight Cordura material across the back of hand for superior abrasion resistance with minimal bulk
Secure Grip – An AX suede palm offers exceptional grip in all conditions, keeping you confident year-round when tackling the trails
Breathability – Mesh fourchettes and moisture wicking fabrics keep your hands from getting sweaty and uncomfortable.
images: Cycling Gloves/Trail Finale Gloves - FrontView - Rapha.avif
Cycling Gloves/Trail Finale Gloves - onModel - Rapha.avif

Cycling Gloves.description: Make your hands comfortable and tough! They cover the entire hand - a must for mountain biking. Touchscreen-compatible, pairable gloves with foam padding on the palm. Designed for mountain bike rides in warm weather lasting up to 4 hours.
key_features: Abrasion resistance – The durable fabric won't get snagged or worn
Tactile efficiency – Touchscreen-compatible fabric (thumb and index)
User comfort – The fingers are pre-shaped and the palm is padded with foam
Moisture management – Ventilated fabric, mesh between the fingers.
images: Cycling Gloves/Comfort Mountain Biking Gloves 500-Khaki - FrontView - Decathlon TRANSPARENT.png
Cycling Gloves/Comfort Mountain Biking Gloves 500-Khaki - Fingers Close View - Decathlon.avif
Cycling Gloves/Comfort Mountain Biking Gloves 500-Khaki - Palm Close View - Decathlon.avif

Cycling Gloves.description: Are you looking for lightweight and fast gloves? Look no further - these gloves embody performance for your most demanding races. Designed for the TEAM DECATHLON CMA-CGM professional cyclists. Designed for performance! Discover the RCR-F aerodynamic gloves, specially designed for cyclists seeking to optimise their performance.
key_features: Aerodynamics – Glove component tested and selected after wind tunnel testing.
Traction – The very thin palm ensures a good grip on the handlebar and reduces friction.
Stretch – Stretch component to adapt to different body types
images: Cycling Gloves/RCR-F Aero Cycling Gloves-White - Front View - Decathlon TRANSPARENT.png
Cycling Gloves/RCR-F Aero Cycling Gloves-White - CloseUp - Decathlon.avif
Cycling Gloves/RCR-F Aero Cycling Gloves-White - PalmView - Decathlon.avif

Cycling Gloves.description: These breathable gloves will keep your hands comfortable and they're so light you'll forget you've even got them on when you go out for a ride. Designed for Mountain biking excursions / Bikepacking / gravel riding in warm weather
key_features: Moisture management – Airy fabric, mesh between the fingers
User comfort – 3-mm foam reinforcement at the palm
Grip – Material on the palm and silicone on the fingers designed for good control
images: Cycling Gloves/100 Breathable Mountain Bike Gloves - FrontView - Decathlon TRANSPARENT.png
Cycling Gloves/100 Breathable Mountain Bike Gloves - FingerView - Decathlon.avif
Cycling Gloves/100 Breathable Mountain Bike Gloves - PalmView - Decathlon.avif

Cycling Gloves.description: XRD frees athletes of rigid, bulky, and constricting padding while it still absorbs more than 90% of energy when impacted at high strain rates. Engineered to withstand the most extreme conditions! Road bike gloves for all of your summer rides.
key_features: Cushioning – Inserts made of Poron Xrd foam on the palm of the gloves.
User comfort – Adjustable thanks to the rip-tab strips to adjust the tightness at the wrist.
Easy dressing – 2 lugs on the back of the ring and middle fingers to make them easy to remove.
Breathability – Mesh fabric to allow air to circulate more easily.
images: Cycling Gloves/Road Cycling Gloves 900 - Front View - Decathlon TRANSPARENT.png
Cycling Gloves/Road Cycling Gloves 900 - PalmView - Decathlon.avif

Cycling Gloves.description: The gloves worn by the Rockrider Ford Racing Team. Very lightweight gloves designed for XC mountain biking. Silicone components guarantee a good grip on the handlebars. Designed for XC mountain biking in training or competition
key_features: Grip – Numerous silicone bands guarantee an excellent grip on the handlebars
Tactile efficiency – Kevlar thread for using your GPS without removing the gloves
Moisture management – Excellent perspiration wicking and quick-drying
Quick drying – Cloth for wiping away sweat during your most intensive rides
images: Cycling Gloves/Mountain Bike Gloves Race Grip - Front View - Decathlon.png
Cycling Gloves/Mountain Bike Gloves Race Grip - onModel - Decathlon.avif

Cycling Helmets.description: POC technology meets Rapha style in a lightweight, aerodynamic and well ventilated Mips helmet, made for hot days and big efforts
key_features: Highly ventilated – Large vents and interior channels keep air flowing
Mips Integra protection – Reduces the risk of brain injury from rotational impacts
EPS liner – Reduces forces in a direct impact
Adjustable fit – 360° fit system delivers secure, precise comfort
Aerodynamic optimised – 22° trailing edge and CFD tested design
Store sunglasses – High-friction pads secure sunglasses when not being worn

Mips Integra protection – Reduces the risk of brain injury from rotational impacts

Cycling Helmets.description: The EXPL540 MIPS mountain bike helmet is the most affordable MIPS model in our range. Combining safety and comfort, it offers advanced protection against oblique impacts thanks to MIPS technology. Designed for MTB, the EXPL540 MIPS helmet is also suitable for cyclists looking for a lightweight, well-ventilated helmet for rides on trails and paths.
key_features: Impact protection – Certified EN 1078. Equipped with MIPS: for better absorption of oblique impacts
Adjustable – Adjustable strap length. 3D adjustment dial
Ventilation – 17 vents for ventilation during ascents. Quick-drying absorbent foam.
Lightweight – Size M: 335g, Size L: 365 g
images: Cycling Helmets/Mountain Bike Helmet EXPL 540 - AngledView - Decathlon TRANSPARENT.png
Cycling Helmets/Mountain Bike Helmet EXPL 540 - BackView - Decathlon.avif

Cycling Helmets/Mountain Bike Helmet EXPL 540 - SideView - Decathlon.avif

Cycling Helmets.description: This helmet was designed so that the ventilation works perfectly when you need it, on long climbs. As soon as you tip upwards, the aerodynamics of this helmet will make all the difference. Designed for your sport rides. Lightweight and ventilated, this is the helmet of the Decathlon CMA CGM team for mountain racing.
key_features: Impact protection – EN 1078 certified Equipped with Mips® AIR better absorption of oblique impacts
Ventilation – 8 air entrances connected to 7 exits via canals
Anatomic design – Turn-ring system for a micrometric adjustment. Occipital adjustment
Aerodynamics – Developed and tested in a wind tunnel to minimise its drag coefficient

Cycling Helmets.description: Protect yourself from branches and impacts. It is easy to position, with two buckles under the ears and one under the chin. It has 15 vents. Designed for your first rides.
key_features: User comfort – Removable foam padding
Ventilation – 15 ventilation channels
Stability – Adjust the helmet using the 2 buckles under the ears and one under the chin
Adjustable – Tightening knob
Impact protection – Complies with EN 1078.

Cycling Helmets.description: Optimal for cyclists looking for compact, well-ventilated helmet with a comfortable adjustment system. New variation of Aerofit 900 helmet with a brand new adjustment system that makes the helmet extremely comfortable.
key_features: Ventilation – The helmet's grille and inner channels facilitate continuous air flow.
Easy dressing – new turn-ring system developed by our teams of engineers.
Compatibility – compatible with our ViooClip lights.
Anatomic design – Ponytail-compatible turn ring

Cycling Helmets.description: This ventilated, comfortable helmet easy adapts to the shape of your head using its adjustment dial. Compatible with VIOO clip bike lights (model 8487105) for added visibility. Protective head gear while occasionally city riding with your bike.
key_features: Visibility – Reflective strips. Compatible with Clip lighting.
Ventilation – 11 air vents located at the front, back and top of the helmet

Cycling Helmets.description: The EXPL500 mountain bike helmet is the most versatile model in our range. Combining safety, comfort and style, it will be your companion on all your adventures. Designed for bike rides lasting over 2 hours.
key_features: Impact protection – Certifications: EN 1078
Ventilation – 17 vents for ventilation during ascents.
Adjustable – 3D tightening wheel. Adjustable strap length.
Compatibility – Compatible with bike light 8487105. Built-in attachment system
Ease of use – Fixed side straps. Quick and easy to pull your pony tail through.

Cycling Helmets.description: Comfy and light, this helmet protects your head from branches and shocks. Bonus features: 9 wide vents and an adjustment dial. Designed for mountain bike rides of up to 2 hours.
key_features: Impact protection – Certifications: EN 1078
Ventilation – 9 vents for ventilation during ascents.
Adjustable – Adjust the helmet to your head using the adjustment dial.
Ease of use – Adjustable side straps

Glasses Product.description: Premium frameless riding glasses designed to offer maximum visibility and comfort on high-tempo training rides and road races.
key_features: Visibility – Frameless design features a one-piece shield lens for an expanded and clear field of view, providing maximum visibility
Clarity – Contrast-enhancing lens technology helps identify hazards and adapt to changes in terrain and light conditions
Light weight – Frameless design achieves minimal weight and "barely there" feel

Glasses Product.description: High-performance half-framed cycling glasses featuring a wide field of vision, photochromic lens adaptability, and robust UV protection.
key_features: Photochromic – A lens that adapts to variations in light intensity
Awareness – Freeform one-piece shield lens extends your field of vision
Clarity – Contrast-enhancing lens technology helps identify hazards and adapt to changes in terrain and light conditions. Lenses are interchangeable.
Stability – Half-framed design for stable fit and lens interchangeability
Versatility – Work with a range of face shapes. Find out more about fit in our Lens and Fit Guide
Protection – Shield design protects from UV, wind and road spray

materials.Frame: High-strength Rilsan® G820 Rnew® high performance polymer (62% biobased)

Glasses Product.description: Sleek, lightweight, and frameless cycling glasses engineered for excellent visibility, ventilation, and premium eye protection on demanding rides.
key_features: Awareness – Frameless freeform shield lens for an extended field of vision
Clarity – Proprietary contrast-enhancing lens technology helps hazard perception and adapt to variations in terrain and light conditions
Super lightweight – Frameless design and materials provides weightless feel
Versatility – Work with a range of face shapes, find out more about fit in our Eyewear Guide
Breathability – Strategically placed ventilation and airflow
Protection – Freeform shield design offers increased protection from UV rays, road spray and debris

materials.Frame: High-strength Rilsan® G820 Rnew® high performance polymer (62% biobased)

key_features: Clarity – Contrast-enhancing lens technology helps identify hazards and adapt to changes in terrain and light conditions
Stability – Half-framed design for stability, clear view of the trail and lens interchangeability
Versatility – Removable security strap for wearing around the neck

Glasses Product.description: Category 3 lenses that block 100% of UV rays. A frameless design offering wide coverage to protect your eyes from wind and flying debris. Perfect for racing along the road or trails at full speed on sunny days.
key_features: Sun protection – Category 3 lens - 100% UV protection filter: Ideal for sunny weather
Coverage – Wraparound design: protects the eyes from wind, objects and the elements.
Field of vision – The single-lens design increases the field of view.
Anti-fogging – Lens vents: reduces fogging.

Glasses Product.description: Lightweight, wide field of vision, and active ventilation. This model features an adaptive photochromic lens designed for high-intensity rides and changing weather conditions.
key_features: Photochromic – Category 1 to 3 photochromic lenses: they darken based on the light intensity.
Coverage – Wraparound design: protects the eyes from wind, objects and the elements.
Lightweight – Lightweight sunglasses: 35.4 g
Anti-fogging – Lens vents: reduces fogging.
Sun protection – Category 1 to 3 photochromic lenses - full UV filter: adjusts to brightness.

Glasses Product.description: Dynamic lines, sleek look, XXL field of vision. These glasses offer optimal clarity and adapt to light conditions thanks to their NXT® photochromic lenses. Perfect hold, even at full speed. Designed for speed and performance.
key_features: Sun protection – Photochromic lens category 0(1)-3 - 100% UV filter. Ideal in any weather.
Durability – Organic polyurethane lenses with exceptional impact resistance
Coverage – Wraparound design: protects the eyes from wind, objects and the elements.

Glasses Product.description: Featuring a lightweight half-rim frame and unique temple structure, the Equinox Eyewear offers a secure fit and exceptional performance in any riding condition. All-Day Comfort: Lightweight half-rim design crafted for on-road and off-road cycling.
key_features: All-Day Comfort – Lightweight half-rim design crafted for on-road and off-road cycling
Secure Fit – Unique cutout temple structure and bio-based Pebax tips integrate seamlessly with helmets
Tuned Optics – RIDESCAPE Bright (BR), Road (RD), All-Road (AR), Trail (TR), and Photochromic lenses highlight surface details for enhanced visibility
Enhanced Protection – Cylindrical, wraparound lens shields eyes from wind, debris, and harsh elements
Fog-Free Ventilation – Strategically placed slits in the lens ensure airflow to reduce fogging
